outputs.description: Insight action Jask.Insight.Entity The main entity related to the insight
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.Action

outputs.description: Who the insight was assigned to Jask.Insight.Description Insight description
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.AssignedTo

outputs.description: Insight IP address Jask.Insight.LastUpdated The time the insight was last updated
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.IpAddress

outputs.description: The last person to update the insight Jask.Insight.Severity Insight severity
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.LastUpdatedBy

outputs.description: The time of the insight Jask.Insight.WorkflowStatus Insight status
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.InsightTime

outputs.description: The ID of the related entity Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.EntityType Related entity type
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.Id

outputs.description: The hostname of the related entity Jask.Insight.SignalList.Id Signal ID
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.Hostname

outputs.description: The source of the signal Jask.Insight.SignalListMetadata.Patterns.Count Number of signals of the category pattern
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.SignalList.SourceType

outputs.description: Number of signals of the category anomaly Jask.Insight.SignalListMetadata.ThreatIntel.Count Number of signals of the category threat intelligence
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.SignalListMetadata.Anomalies.Count

outputs.description: IP address of the related entity Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.IsWhitelisted Whether or not the entity is on allow list
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.IpAddress

outputs.description: The risk score of the related entity Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.Source The source of the related entity
outputs.name: Jask.Insight.RelatedEntityList.RiskScore
